idx_subtitle.text: A Safari extension that supercharges 4chan with 40+ modules.

sec_features_title.text: Everything you need, rebuilt for Safari

idx_c1_d.text: Draggable, resizable reply box with draft autosave and one-tap quoting

idx_c2_d.text: Click thumbnails to expand full images and videos in place

idx_c3_d.text: Bookmark threads, badge unread counts on the favicon and popup

idx_c4_d.text: Reddit-style indented replies; nested view of who quoted whom

idx_c5_d.text: One-click mute by name, tripcode, ID, image MD5, or filename

idx_c6_d.text: Per-post translate button via Google, Bing, Yandex, or Papago

idx_c7_d.text: YouTube, Vimeo, Streamable, Twitch, Imgur, Reddit, Bitchute

idx_c8_d.text: Fully localized UI with autonym dropdown picker

idx_c9_d.text: A clean, card-based catalog with rounded thumbnails, hover states, and themed controls

row1_d.text: Hover any quote to preview the linked post inline. Backlinks list every reply beneath each post.

row2_d.text: Adds a post-count badge next to each poster ID. Click it to highlight every post from the same author.

row3_d.text: Turns bare links in posts into clickable anchors. Surfaced in settings because 4chan keeps it off by default.

row4_d.text: A cohesive dark or light skin that restyles the native 4chan board, catalog, and reply form.

row5_d.text: One purchase covers Mac, iPad, and iPhone. No separate tier, no subscription, no in-app purchases.

row6_d.text: A master switch plus a toggle for every module. Turn off what you don't use without uninstalling.

row7_d.text: A welcome sheet on first launch after every update shows what changed, with NEW pills on recently added settings.

s1_d.text: Download Clover Crow. One purchase covers Mac, iPhone, and iPad via Family Sharing.

s2_d.text: Open Safari Settings, then Extensions, then enable Clover Crow and grant it access to 4chan.

s3_d.text: Browse 4chan as usual. Clover Crow takes over with previews, the watcher, quick reply, and more. Tune everything in settings.

sec_why_title.text: The complete toolkit, native to Safari

w1_d.text: Clover Crow packs the power-user toolkit long-time browsers expect, the quote previews, watcher, quick reply, and filters, tuned for Safari.

w2_d.text: No accounts, no telemetry, no cloud. Your watched threads, filters, and preferences live entirely on your device.

w3_d.text: Translated into 32 non-English locales, switchable in-app, independent of your system language.

req.text: Requires macOS 14.0 (Sonoma) or later, or iOS / iPadOS 17.0 or later. Works with Safari 17+.

carousel_sub.text: Privacy-first apps for macOS, iOS, and Safari.

f_brand.text: Indie software studio. Building focused, privacy-first tools for Apple platforms.

idx_about_disclaimer.text: Clover Crow is an independent project. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by 4chan or its operators. The "4chan" name is used here descriptively to identify the platform this extension enhances.

prv_subtitle.text: Clover Crow for Safari. Last updated 2026-05-13

prv_tldr_body.text: Clover Crow does not collect, transmit, or share any personal data. Every setting and every cached value stays on your device. There is no analytics, no telemetry, no account, and no server.

prv_what_body.text: Clover Crow is a Safari Web Extension that enhances the 4chan browsing experience with 40+ modules: thread watcher, quote previews, inline image expansion, a quick-reply box, regex filters, extended embeds, and more. It runs entirely inside your browser; the host app exists only to install the extension into Safari.

prv_data_lead.text: None that ever leaves your device.

prv_data_body.text: Clover Crow stores the following on your device using Safari's local extension storage:

prv_data_i1_d.text: : which features you have enabled and any options you have customized (e.g. theme, quick-reply transparency, autoupdate interval).

prv_data_i2_d.text: : counts of posts you have seen so the unread badge works (kept up to 30 days).

prv_data_i3_d.text: : only if you actively use the Thread Watcher or Saved Drafts modules.

prv_data_i4_d.text: : your selected display language, whether the review prompt has been dismissed, popup-open count for triggering that prompt.

prv_data_foot.text: All of this lives in Safari's browser.storage.local sandbox. It is never read by Clover Crow's developer, and it is never sent to any server.

prv_net_body.text: Clover Crow's content scripts only run on 4chan.org / 4channel.org pages. The extension makes additional network requests only to 4chan's own public endpoints (a.4cdn.org, i.4cdn.org, s.4cdn.org) for thread updates and image expansion, the same endpoints your browser already hits when you load 4chan normally.

prv_net_optional.text: Optional features that can route traffic to third-party services, all off by default:

prv_net_i1_d.text: : opens a translation URL (Google / Bing / Yandex / Papago) in a new tab when you click the per-post translate button. Their privacy practices are governed by their own policies.

prv_net_i2_d.text: : links dead quotes to third-party 4chan archive sites (e.g. archived.moe).

prv_net_i3_d.text: : when you click an embed button, the embed iframe loads from the original host (YouTube, Vimeo, Imgur, etc.).

prv_perms_body.text: Safari grants Clover Crow the following permissions:

prv_perms_i1.text: storage: to save your preferences locally.

prv_perms_i2.text: Host access to 4chan.org / 4channel.org, so the extension can modify 4chan pages.

prv_perms_i3.text: Host access to a.4cdn.org, i.4cdn.org, s.4cdn.org, 4chan's official JSON, image, and static-asset endpoints.

prv_third_body.text: Clover Crow does not embed analytics SDKs, crash reporters, advertising libraries, or social-media trackers. No third-party JavaScript is loaded at runtime unless you explicitly invoke an opt-in feature listed above.

prv_children_body.text: Clover Crow does not knowingly process data from children. Since 4chan's own terms require users to be at least 18, and Clover Crow only operates on 4chan, this requirement is enforced upstream.

prv_changes_body.text: If this policy ever changes, the "Last updated" date at the top will reflect the new revision. Material changes will also be mentioned in the extension's release notes.

prv_footer.text: Clover Crow is developed by Corvus Devs.
